title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
